description.title: Description
description.html:
• Indulge in the perfect blend of creamy and crunchy with Baskin Robbins Hazelnut Ice Cream Cone, the ultimate indulgent treat.
  • Creamy and crunchy blend made with milk chocolate and roasted hazelnuts.
  • Smooth and velvety ice cream coated in milk chocolate confectionery.
  • Indulgent 110ml cone with a symphony of flavours from hazelnut and chocolate.
  • Returns and Refund Policy: This item is eligible for a refund or replacement within 2 days of purchase, in an unlikely event of a damaged/defective/incorrect item. In case of an incorrect item, you may raise a refund or replacement request only if the item is sealed/unopened/unused.
  • Returns And Refund Policy:
  • This item is eligible for a refund within 2 days of purchase in the unlikely event of a damaged, defective, or incorrect item.
  • In case of an incorrect item, a refund or replacement request can be raised only if the item is sealed, unopened, and unused.

info_cards.title: Storage Instructions
info_cards.html:
Keep Baskin Robbins Hazelnut Rocher Ice Cream Cone frozen at -18u00b0C to maintain its rich, decadent flavour and creamy consistency.

  • Keep frozen at -18 degree celsius or below.
  • Use within 2 months of opening or by expiry date.
  • Store in an airtight container, avoid thawing/refreezing for optimal texture.
